title: Bill Clinton jokes about his age in DNC speech
shortDescription: Bill Clinton turned 78 on Aug. 19 while Donald Trump celebrated his 78th birthday in June. Age has been talking point of the 2024 Election.

title: No longer in Biden's shadow, Harris represents Democrats' new era
shortDescription: Vice President Kamala Harris will represent the Democratic Party's generational shift as she formally accepts her party's presidential nomination.

title: Democrats in Sun Belt battlegrounds seize on Harris campaign energy
shortDescription: Party leaders in Arizona, Georgia and Nevada say they'll leave the Chicago convention with plans to transform enthusiasm into votes for Kamala Harris.

title: Jewish Democrats have party loyalties tested in 2024 election
shortDescription: Jewish Americans are a loyal Democratic constituency. But that loyalty has been tested amid unrest on the left over the war in Gaza.

title: Some Black voters greet Harris campaign with apathy in Chicago
shortDescription: A Harris nomination at the Democratic convention in Chicago won't matter to some Black Chicagoans who are still furious over the migrant surge.
